listingUrls.title: Listing URLs
listingUrls.description: List of Airbnb listing URLs to scrape reviews from. Example: https://www.airbnb.com/rooms/12345678

maxReviewsPerListing.title: Maximum Reviews per Listing
maxReviewsPerListing.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per listing

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for the crawler. Use Apify Proxy for best results.
